# Template H2 Structures

> Extracted from `azure-artifacts/SKILL.md` for progressive loading.
> Load when generating a specific artifact to get the exact H2 heading sequence.

## 01-requirements.md (Requirements Agent)

```text
## 🎯 Project Overview

## 💰 Budget
## 🔧 Operational Requirements
## 🌍 Regional Preferences

## References
```
